I​ need​ this​ fixed​ ASAP​ -​ I​ have​ a​ compliance​ deadline​ tomorrow.

subject: Nightly ETL job failing since Tuesday
description:
The nightly ETL pipeline has been failing every night since Tuesday. Here are the last few lines from the log:

2026-03-15 02:00:01 [INFO] Starting ETL pipeline: finance_daily_load
2026-03-15 02:00:02 [INFO] Connecting to source: sql-prod-finance-01.database.windows.net
2026-03-15 02:00:03 [INFO] Authenticated via SPN: spn-etl-finance@contoso.com
2026-03-15 02:00:15 [INFO] Extracting: dbo.transactions (est. 2.4M rows)
2026-03-15 02:15:42 [ERROR] ADLS write failed: HTTP 403 Forbidden
2026-03-15 02:15:42 [ERROR] Target: abfss://finance@contosodatalake.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/
2026-03-15 02:15:42 [ERROR] Details: AuthorizationPermissionMismatch - The request is not authorized to perform this operation using this permission.
2026-03-15 02:15:43 [ERROR] SPN ObjectId: a8f3c2e1-4b5d-4f6a-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
2026-03-15 02:15:43 [WARN] Retry 1/3 in 30s...
2026-03-15 02:16:13 [ERROR] ADLS write failed: HTTP 403 Forbidden
2026-03-15 02:16:43 [ERROR] ADLS write failed: HTTP 403 Forbidden
2026-03-15 02:16:44 [FATAL] Pipeline finance_daily_load FAILED after 3 retries

timestamp,pipeline,status,duration_s,rows_processed,error_code
2026-03-12,finance_daily_load,SUCCESS,945,2412847,
2026-03-13,finance_daily_load,SUCCESS,1023,2398103,
2026-03-14,finance_daily_load,SUCCESS,998,2405291,
2026-03-15,finance_daily_load,FAILED,943,0,HTTP_403
2026-03-16,finance_daily_load,FAILED,12,0,HTTP_403
2026-03-17,finance_daily_load,FAILED,11,0,HTTP_403

Looks like a permission issue on the data lake. The SPN permissions might have been changed during the weekend maintenance.

subject: Client portal crashing
description:
The client portal keeps crashing. Here's what I see:

System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of an object.
   at Contoso.Portal.Services.ClientAccountService.GetBalance(String accountId) in D:\src\Portal\Services\ClientAccountService.cs:line 142
   at Contoso.Portal.Controllers.DashboardController.LoadSummary(HttpContext ctx) in D:\src\Portal\Controllers\DashboardController.cs:line 87
   at Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Infrastructure.ActionMethodExecutor.TaskOfIActionResultExecutor.Execute(ActionContext context)
   at Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Infrastructure.ControllerActionInvoker.InvokeActionMethodAsync()
   at Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Infrastructure.ControllerActionInvoker.InvokeNextActionFilterAsync()
--- End of stack trace from previous location ---
   at Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Infrastructure.ControllerActionInvoker.Rethrow()
   at Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Infrastructure.ControllerActionInvoker.Next()

This happens for every client who tries to view their account dashboard. Started about 30 minutes ago.

subject: WiFi问题 - Singapore office very slow
description:
Hi IT team,

WiFi di pejabat Singapore sangat perlahan hari ini. 网速非常慢，几乎不能工作。

I've tested on my phone and laptop - both are slow. Speed test shows only 2 Mbps download (biasanya 200+ Mbps). 其他同事也有同样的问题。

We are on the 'Contoso-Corp-SG' SSID, 12th floor. 已经试过重启电脑了，没有用。

Tolong selesaikan secepat mungkin, we have video calls with NY office this afternoon.

谢谢,
Wei Lin Tan

subject: URGENT: Production database backup failed - daily job skipped last night
Phone call — user reporting login issue
description:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
================


Agent:		Hi, how can I help you today?

Caller:		Yeah, um, I can't log in.


Agent:		Okay, what system are you trying to access?

Caller:		The... uh... the VPN thing? Global... something?


Agent:		GlobalProtect VPN?

Caller:		Yeah that one. It says my password is wrong
			but I just changed it yesterday.



Agent:		Did you update the password in the VPN client?

Caller:		I... don't know? How do I do that?


Agent:		I'll create a ticket for the IAM team.

		[END OF CALL]

subject: Suspicious email with attachment - possible phishing
description:
I received a suspicious email that looked like it was from our CEO but the email address was slightly different (ceo@cont0so.com vs contoso.com). It had an attachment that I accidentally opened. Here's what was in it:





After opening it my antivirus popped up with a warning but then nothing happened. I'm worried my machine might be compromised. Should I disconnect from the network?
